title: Sable: Ragdolls
description: Ragdolls powered by Sable's physics system
body:
Sable Player Ragdoll adds physics-driven player ragdolls using Sable’s physics system!

The mod also includes a public API for addon developers. Addons can trigger player ragdolls, spawn playerless dummy ragdolls, set despawn behavior, use datapack item tags and more.

## **Features**
- Press H to tumble!
- Press Shift to get back up!
- Physics-backed player ragdolls
- Dummy ragdoll spawning
- Skin/profile support for dummy ragdolls
- Configurable dummy despawn behavior
- Datapack tag support for ragdoll-on-hit items
- Public API for addon mods
# 
# [Ragdoll Reactions Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/ragdoll-reactions)
